pages.text: UGC Approved Online University & Degree Courses in India
Manav Rachna Online: Reinventing Learning Pathways with Online Degrees
A Virtual Experience Inside Manav Rachna Online

Continuing the legacy of our founder Dr. O.P. Bhalla, Manav Rachna has launched the “Manav Rachna Centre for Distance and Online Education (MRCDOE) to offer immense learning opportunities to students beyond borders. With a vision to impart quality online education to students and working professionals, MRCDOE is providing industry-oriented online undergraduate (UG) and online postgraduate (PG) degree courses in various fields of business, IT, economics, finance, and literature.

Manav Rachna Online has collaborated with globally acclaimed organisations like Microsoft, ACCA, AHPI, Meta, Unity, IT Specialist and Auto Desk to equip our students with the industry's best knowledge and expertise.
Explore how Manav Rachna Online has helped learners grow, upsikll, and succeed - through flexible programs and career-focused learning.

The online learning platform has revolutionized my approach to education. The flexible scheduling and comprehensive curriculum have enabled me to balance my professional commitments while advancing my academic goals.

The online learning platform has revolutionized my approach to education. The flexible scheduling and comprehensive curriculum have enabled me to balance my professional commitments while advancing my academic goals.

The online learning platform has revolutionized my approach to education. The flexible scheduling and comprehensive curriculum have enabled me to balance my professional commitments while advancing my academic goals.
From personalized career counseling to virtual job fairs and industry tie-ups, we support your journey every step of the way — until you land a role that aligns with your goals.

Manav Rachna has launched Manav Rachna Online to provide quality programmes to those students who are not able to draw benefits from conventional system of Education. Students can perfectly reshape their career and future through impeccably designed online programmes. The renowned faculty, cutting-edge advanced curriculum, technology-driven and a remarkable content delivery will be helpful in the successful implementation of online programs.
MREI Campus: Sector-43, Aravalli Hills, Delhi – Surajkund Road, Faridabad – 121004, (Haryana), India
